message:
refactor(hooks): remove Gas Town role detection from beads core

Remove hardcoded Gas Town role detection (polecat, witness, refinery,
mayor, deacon) from bd hooks. These are Gas Town concepts and should
be handled by gastown, not beads core.

Keeps crew role detection as it is a shared concept.

Closes bd-7nd6t

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
